title: Typhoon Over Nagasaki
writer: Yves Ciampi, Zenzô Matsuyama, Thomas Racaut
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Jean Marais, Keiko Kishi
plot: Pierre Marsac, a French engineer working for the Nagasaki shipbuilding yards, has fallen in love both with Japan and a charming Japanese girl named Noriko. But Françoise Fabre, a French journalist and Pierre's former lover, contac...
